description: The Aston Martin DB11, produced from 2016 to 2024, ushered in a new era with turbocharged engines replacing the naturally aspirated V12. Available with either a Mercedes-AMG-sourced 4.0-litre twin-turbo V8 or Aston's own 5.2-litre twin-turbo V12, it combined cutting-edge aerodynamics with traditional craftsmanship.
